children.heading: Availability of appropriated funds
children.label: a Availability of appropriated funds
children.text: Amounts appropriated under this chapter shall remain available until expended.

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: b Administrative expenses
children.text: Of the amounts appropriated to carry out this chapter for a fiscal year, the Secretaries may expend not more than five percent to cover the administrative expenses necessary to carry out this chapter.
